_instructions: Copy this template for each new insert. Remove this _instructions block before importing.

_fields.type: REQUIRED - Insert type (e.g. Turning, Grooving, Threading, Profiling, Parting, Chamfering, etc.)
_fields.material: REQUIRED - Insert material (e.g. Carbide, CBN, Ceramic)
_fields.compatibility: REQUIRED - Holder compatibility (e.g. KM16 Series holders)
_fields.application: REQUIRED - What it is used for
_fields.geometry: REQUIRED - Insert geometry (e.g. Positive rake, 80-degree diamond, Wiper edge)
_fields.grade: REQUIRED - Grade designation (e.g. KC5025, KCU25, CVD-coated for steel)
_fields.specs: REQUIRED - Key specs (e.g. ISO: CNMG 120408, Nose radius: 0.4mm)
_fields.manufacturer: REQUIRED - Manufacturer name (e.g. Kennametal, Iscar, PH Horn)
_fields.source: REQUIRED - URL or catalog reference (e.g. Kennametal Catalog p.42 or https://kennametal.com/...)
